title: I built a desktop cockpit that makes Claude Code dramatically better — $49 once, forever
text:
Long-time Claude Code daily driver here. Two years ago I started losing the thread on multi-week projects — Claude rediscovering 'what done meant' between sessions, routing decisions evaporating, no place to run a real mission graph that survives a context reset.

So I built ORANGEBOX Command. Windows desktop app (Tauri 2.x, MSI installer) that pairs with Claude Code via 60+ MCP tools. Local-first. Zero telemetry. $49 once, forever.

https://atomeons.com/orangebox

Happy to answer anything about the architecture.

v1.5.0. live.

the AI cockpit you actually own.

$1 till 6am ET.

yes. one dollar. one cockpit. forever.

→ atomeons.com/orangebox
